calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(host=[$0])
    LogicalFilter(condition=[GREATER_IP($0, IP('1.1.1.1'))])
      CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_weblogs]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..12=[{inputs}], expr#13=['1.1.1.1':EXPR_IP VARCHAR], expr#14=[GREATER_IP($t0, $t13)], host=[$t0], $condition=[$t14])
    CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_weblogs]])
